title: cola

state.auto_save_failed: Automatic save failed. Click Save to keep this file.

waiting_notice: Actualmente hay {{ count }} videos en la cola. Espera pacientemente la descarga.
success_notice: Se han descargado correctamente {{ count }} videos en este lote.
manual_save_warning: Important: after videos finish, click Save for any item that was not auto-saved. If you chose a folder for batch auto-save, look in that folder first; otherwise check browser downloads (Ctrl+J) or your device Downloads folder.
keep_awake_warning: Batch download is running. Keep this device awake until every item finishes, then click "Save" for the completed files.
keep_awake_auto_save_warning: Batch download is running. Keep this device awake; each completed file will be saved to your selected folder automatically.
network_stalled_waiting: La red está temporalmente lenta. La descarga sigue esperando datos y continuará automáticamente.
